# Anduril Unveils Barracuda-M Family of Cruise Missiles

The Barracuda family of air-breathing, software-defined expendable Autonomous Air Vehicles (AAVs) is designed for low-cost, hyper-scale production, rapid upgrades, and flexible employment.
